rationale: The citing paper uses Palmatier, Scheer, and Steenkamp (2007) in its core framing of connected exchange relationships, not just as a background list citation. It explicitly states that the study answers recent calls on governance spillovers or interplays across connected marketing relationships and attributes that call to this source. The citation also anchors the description of the subsidiary-distributor dyad in the paper's conceptual setup. Although the citing paper does not reuse the cited paper's measures or empirical design, it meaningfully relies on it for conceptual positioning.
relation_description: The citing paper treats the cited work as conceptual groundwork for studying spillovers across connected relationships. It builds on that framing by examining a different connected dyad system (HQ-subsidiary and subsidiary-distributor) in multinational channel governance.
